evals.prompt: Estimate the critical properties of ethanol from its SMILES string CCO using the group contribution method. Return a JSON report with the matched groups and the estimated Tb, Tc, Pc, Vc.
evals.expected_output: A JSON report containing properties (Tb around 337 K, Tc around 500 K, etc.) and three matched groups: -OH(alcohol), -CH2-, -CH3. No unmatched atoms.
expectations: Properties include Tb, Tc, Pc, Vc and acentric_factor

evals.prompt: Use group contribution to estimate critical properties for cyclohexane (SMILES: C1CCCCC1). Give me the JSON report.
evals.expected_output: A JSON report showing six -CH2-(ring) groups and estimated properties. No unmatched atoms.
expectations: Properties include Tb, Tc, Pc, Vc and acentric_factor

evals.prompt: Calculate critical properties for zinc chloride from SMILES [Zn](Cl)Cl with the group contribution method and show the JSON output.
evals.expected_output: A JSON report matching the worked example in DES_properties.xlsx: Tb=501.6 K, Tc≈970 K, Vc=281.26 cm3/mol, groups -Zn and -Cl (count 2).
expectations: Normal boiling point is exactly or very close to 501.6 K
Critical volume is 281.26 cm3/mol and acentric factor is about 1.0134

evals.prompt: Estimate critical properties for benzene (SMILES: c1ccccc1) using group contribution. Return a JSON report with the matched groups and estimated properties.
evals.expected_output: The model should match six aromatic CH groups (using the =CH-(ring) fallback) and estimate Tb, Tc, Pc, Vc. No unmatched atoms.
expectations: Exactly six aromatic CH -> =CH-(ring) groups are matched
Properties include Tb, Tc, Pc, Vc and acentric_factor
